properties.name: Mobile Water Treatment Trailer
properties.description: Trailer-mounted mobile water treatment unit capable of treating surface water or groundwater. Suitable for communities facing source contamination or infrastructure failure.

properties.name: Emergency Response Trailer – Water & Wastewater
properties.description: Stocked emergency response trailer with tools, safety gear, lights, saws, and portable equipment for water/wastewater emergencies. Available to VT WARN members.

properties.name: Trailer-Mounted 500 GPM Wastewater Pump
properties.description: High-capacity 500 GPM trailer-mounted pump for wastewater bypass pumping during lift station failures, pipe breaks, or flooding events.

properties.name: Ground Penetrating Radar Unit
properties.description: Ground penetrating radar for locating buried water and sewer mains, valves, and other underground infrastructure without excavation.

properties.name: Portable Correlator – Leak Detection
properties.description: Acoustic leak correlator for pinpointing leaks in pressurized water mains. Reduces excavation costs and emergency response time.

properties.name: Valve & Hydrant Exerciser
properties.description: Motorized valve and hydrant exerciser for maintaining gate valves and fire hydrants. Helps ensure operability during emergencies.

properties.name: Tilt-and-Pan Sewer Line Camera
properties.description: CCTV sewer inspection camera for assessing pipe condition, identifying blockages, and locating damage after floods or ground movement.

properties.name: Portable Water Storage Tank – 10,000 Gal
properties.description: Collapsible 10,000-gallon potable water storage bladder tank for emergency water distribution. NSF-certified for drinking water use.

properties.name: Pumper / Vactor Truck
properties.description: Combination vacuum/jetter truck for sewer cleaning, lift station bypass, and wastewater emergency response. Currently deployed to assist neighboring utility.

properties.name: Portable Generator – 75 kW
properties.description: Trailer-mounted 75 kW diesel generator for backup power at water treatment plants, pump stations, or wastewater facilities during outages.

properties.name: Portable Generator – 100 kW
properties.description: Skid-mounted 100 kW generator available for emergency deployment to water or wastewater facilities. Includes transfer switch and 500-gallon fuel tank.

properties.name: Mobile Pump Station Skid
properties.description: Self-contained portable pump station skid for bypass pumping of sewer lift stations. Includes controls, float switches, and quick-connect fittings.

properties.name: Mobile Water Treatment Unit
properties.description: Skid-mounted filtration and disinfection unit for temporary drinking water treatment. Suitable for surface water sources up to 200 GPM.

properties.name: Bottled Water Supply – Pallet Stock
properties.description: Emergency pallets of bottled water (500 cases/pallet) for distribution during boil water advisories or distribution system failures. Available on 24-hour notice.

properties.name: Test
properties.description: Test item at VRWA headquarters. 20 Susie Wilson Road, Suite B, Essex Junction, VT 05452.
